key_insight: PA-SciML makes agentic scientific machine learning verify physics on each candidate model, not just minimize error.
engineering_relevance: For solid mechanics surrogates, this helps ensure predicted fields obey boundary conditions, stiffness scaling, superposition, and causality before a model is trusted.
method: Fix the evaluator before search and derive machine-checkable physics requirements.
Check each trained candidate against those requirements on predicted outputs.
Search input/load-history spans for high-violation cases and only report a surrogate as verified under the stated checks.
evidence_signal: In the paper’s elasticity and elastodynamics examples, the selected PA-SciML surrogate achieved lower validation error than the error-only baseline in one case, and a baseline with similar mean error failed a stricter causality test in the transient case.
watch_item: Verification depends on the chosen physics checks and search ranges, so untested failure modes may still slip through if the auditing criteria are incomplete.
paper_title: Physics-Audited Agentic Discovery in Scientific Machine Learning
